mapper.select:
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ATTENDANCE WHERE EMP_ID = #{empId} AND ATT_LATE_YN = 'Y' AND TO_CHAR(ATT_WORK_DT, 'YYYY-MM') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM')) as ATT_LATE_CT,
(SELECT NVL(SUM(ATT_DAY_TIME), 0) FROM ATTENDANCE WHERE EMP_ID = #{empId} AND TO_CHAR(ATT_WORK_DT, 'YYYY-MM') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM')) as ATT_MON_TIME,
(SELECT ANN_LEAVE_REMAIN FROM ANNUAL_LEAVE WHERE EMP_ID = #{empId} AND ANN_LEAVE_YEAR = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY')) as ANN_LEAVE_REMAIN,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM APRV_VCT_DOC WHERE EMP_ID = #{empId} AND VCT_STTS = '결재완료' AND (TO_CHAR(VCT_DOC_BGNG, 'YYYY-MM') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM') OR TO_CHAR(VCT_DOC_END, 'YYYY-MM') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM'))) as VCT_COUNT,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM APRV_BZTRP_DOC WHERE EMP_ID = #{empId} AND BZTRP_STTS = '결재완료' AND (TO_CHAR(BZTRP_START, 'YYYY-MM') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM') OR TO_CHAR(BZTRP_END, 'YYYY-MM') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM'))) as BZTRP_COUNT
FROM DUAL
